title: Accordion-fold zine from a single sheet
sources: SYNTHESISED — well-documented zine-making practice; the accordion fold is a public-domain structure
notes: A single A3 or A2 sheet scored and folded into an accordion (concertina) structure. Covers: calculating fold positions for equal panels, scoring with a bone folder, the order of mountain and valley folds, an optional cover made from bookbinding board, attaching the accordion block inside the cover. Result: a small book that folds flat or opens as a continuous panoramic strip.
